title: German Potato Fritters with Mexican Twist
description: A flavorful fusion of German potato fritters and Mexican cuisine, perfect for a snack or side dish.
instructions: In a large bowl, mash the potatoes using a fork or potato masher.
Add the crushed tortilla chips, rye flour, onion, cumin, chili powder, and salt to the bowl. Mix well.
Beat the eggs in a separate bowl and add them to the potato mixture. Mix until a dough forms.
Using your hands, shape the dough into small patties.
Heat a large non-stick skillet or frying pan over medium heat.
Add a small amount of oil to the pan and swirl it around.
When the oil is hot, add 2-3 patties to the pan and flatten them slightly using a spatula.
Cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
